Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 20
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 11
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 2.8 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

# Jan 20 2002 at 9:48 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591761033621
93 posts
Drops off any of the rats in DN, its very common and i don't know why people insist on charging 5k+ for items that have no stat bonus, just a good look. Wait, that sounds like real life... hmm...

Anyway, very common, wouldnt pay more than 3k for it, its not THAT great a weapon.
